arts.sum: The brass at Atlético Madrid have sent a new bid to La Liga rivals Barcelona, to take over permanent ownership of Clément Lenglet. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have…

arts.ttl: La Liga president Tebas sends fresh threat to Barcelona over Dani Olmo
arts.sum: La Liga president Javier Tebas has confirmed that the Spanish football authorities are continuing to push to have Barcelona star Dani Olmo unregistered. The long-running ‘registration case’ in Catalunya’s capital…

arts.ttl: Barcelona planning to lock down Hansi Flick to new deal
arts.sum: Barcelona were expected to struggle this season following a down year under Xavi Hernandez, with only Dani Olmo and Pau Victor arriving in the summer to address those issues. However with three months to go in the season, Barcelona find themselves as contenders in all three major competitions, having already won the Spanish Supercup. According […] The post Barcelona planning to lock down Hansi Flick to new deal appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Surprise Barcelona star leading Robert Lewandowski with goals-per-minute ratio this season

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted lineup vs Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: DM: Frenkie de Jong - De Jong was kept on the bench for the majority of the Las Palmas game, which appeared to be an attempt from Flick to protect the Dutchman as he continues to work his way back to his best. CB: Pau Cubarsi - The youngster did just play 90 minutes against Las Palmas but is undoubtedly part of Flick's favoured back line and is likely to retain his place.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Xavi Man Utd TRUTH, Barcelona deal DONE, De Bruyne Man City SHOCK
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the truth behind Man Utd's links to Xavi, Kevin de Bruyne's Man City future and Barcelona's potential sale of Vitor Roque. arts.ttl: Hansi Flick makes Lamine Yamal plea as Barcelona boss provides injury update ahead of Copa del Rey semi-final
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick makes a plea to match officials as his provides an injury update on Lamine Yamal ahead of Tuesday's Copa del Rey semi-final first leg against Atletico Madrid.
